chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Income Tax Reference Application No.77 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES Hearing of case [Priority] 1. For orders on office objection No.11 2. For hearing of CMA No.475 of 2025 [Stay Application] 3. For hearing of main case 13.03.2025 Mr. Usman Alam, Advocate for the Applicant ************ Applicant’s Counsel submits that the rectification application filed by the Applicant has been allowed; therefore, this Income Tax Reference Application has become infructuous. Ordered accordingly. ACTING CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE Qurban/PA*
